name: Sticky Rice with Mango
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak, rinse and steam the rice. Set aside.
2. In a small pot over medium heat, combine coconut milk, 2/3 cup sugar, and 1/2 tsp salt. Cook, stirring constantly, for 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Pour 1/4 cup of this mixture over the warm rice and toss gently until just combined. Cover and set aside for 30 minutes.
4. In another small pot over medium heat, bring remaining sugar, salt, and coconut cream to a boil. Cook uncovered, stirring frequently, for 5 to 8 minutes.
5. Mound the rice on an oval-shaped platter and drizzle with the coconut cream mixture. Peel, halve, and cut mango into 1/2 inch slices. Place next to rice on the platter.
